name: Deep Focus
description: Ambient and modern classical for drafting. No lyrics, nothing that argues back.

name: Late Night Drive
description: Bus-window music for the ride home from a Thursday open mic.

name: Workout Sweat
description: Loud enough for the community-center yoga room when nobody else booked it.

name: Sunday Brunch
description: Batch-cook soundtrack. Lentils on the stove, windows open.

name: Indie Discoveries
description: New folk and indie picked up from Dex and the shop playlist.

name: Hip-Hop Essentials
description: Hip-Hop Essentials — a rotating mix Jennifer keeps for the bus and the desk.
